I don't hack systems.
I expose the truth hidden inside them.

Security researcher. Reality exposer.
The world runs on broken code —
I'm just the one who reads it.

// The next Mr. Robot.

[ philosophy.txt ]
// I am not the villain.
// I am the one who sees the villain's backdoor.

I expose vulnerabilities so they get fixed.
I break what's broken before someone worse does.
Every report I file makes the internet
a slightly less dangerous place.

// This is what ethical hacking means.
// This is why I do it.
